briefdescription.para: Register offsets for the XI3c device.

detaileddescription.para: Version Register

briefdescription.para: I3C CMD & WR FIFO LVL Register.
I3C RESP & RD FIFO LVL Register.
I3C Target dynamic Address and BCR Register.
Maximum Write and Max Read length.
BIT 5 - Generate ACK for secondary controller role request IBI.
BIT 10 - This field will be set if there is no START coming from the new Controller that has took over the Role.
BIT 11 - Received ACK on controller role request back.
BIT 19 - Dynamic address assigned to slave.
BIT 19 - Dynamic address assigned to slave.
BIT 10 - This field will be set if there is no START coming from the new Controller that has took over the Role.
BIT 11 - Received ACK on controller role request back.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to select the specific register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u32 XI3c_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress. int RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to select the specific register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XI3c_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, int RegOffset, u32 RegisterValue)

parameterdescription.para: is the instance of I3C
is a pointer to the XI3c core instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c core instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c core instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c core instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c core instance.
address of the XI3c core instance.
mask value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u16 XI3c_EnableREInterrupts(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 IntrMask)

parameterdescription.para: address of the XI3c core instance.
mask value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u16 XI3c_EnableFEInterrupts(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 IntrMask)

parameterdescription.para: address of the XI3c core instance.
mask value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u16 XI3c_DisableREInterrupts(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 IntrMask)

parameterdescription.para: address of the XI3c core instance.
mask value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u16 XI3c_DisableFEInterrupts(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 IntrMask)

parameterdescription.para: address of the XI3c core instance.
mask value.
address of the XI3c core instance.
mask value.

briefdescription.para: Fill Slave send byte count value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c core instance.
count value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XI3c_FillSlaveSendCount(XI3c *InstancePtr, u16 ByteCount)

briefdescription.para: Clear the group address of target.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c core instance.
count value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XI3c_FillSlaveSendCount(XI3c *InstancePtr, u16 ByteCount)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c core instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c core instance.

briefdescription.para: The handler data type allows the user to define a callback function to respond to interrupt events in the system.

detaileddescription.para: This function is executed in interrupt context, so amount of processing should be minimized.

parameterdescription.para: is the callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked. Its type is not important to the driver, so it is a void pointer.
indicates one or more status events that occurred.

detaileddescription.para: Configuration table.

briefdescription.para: This table contains configuration information for each I3C device in the system.

detaileddescription.para: Configuration table.

briefdescription.para: This configure target address and BCR register values of available devices to the controller RAM.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the number of slave devices present.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the XI3c slaves devices by disable/enable events and reset dynamic addresses.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XI3c instance such that the driver is ready to use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a reference to a structure containing information about a specific I3C device. This function initializes an InstancePtr object for a specific device specified by the contents of Config.

is the device base address in the virtual memory address space. The caller is responsible for keeping the address mapping from EffectiveAddr to the device physical base address unchanged once this function is invoked. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping changes after this function is called. If address translation is not used, use ConfigPtr->BaseAddress for this parameter, passing the physical address instead.

simplesect.para: The return value is XST_SUCCESS if successful.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.

inbodydescription.para: < Repeated start or Termination on Completion: 4th bit
< RW: 8th bit + Device address: 9 to 15 bits
< No.of bytes R/W to/from R/W FIFOs

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the base address of the device.

briefdescription.para: This function sends dynamic Address Assignment for available devices.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is an array of dynamic addresses.
is the number of slave devices present.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: A table contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the ID of the device to look up the configuration for.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID was not found. See xi3c.h for the definition of XI3c_Config.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd.
is the command value.

inbodydescription.para: < SIze of the command is 8 bits

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is Scl clock to be configured in Hz.
is the mode of operation I2C/I3C.

simplesect.para: The return value is XST_SUCCESS if successful.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the status handler, which the driver calls when it encounters conditions that should be reported to the higher layer software.

detaileddescription.para: The handler executes in an interrupt context, so the amount of processing should be minimized
Refer to the xi3c.h file for a list of events. The events are defined to start with XI3C_EVENT_*.

InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
FunctionPtr
is the pointer to the callback function.
None.
The handler is called within interrupt context, so it should finish its work quickly.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a interrupt mode send in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It sends data to the FIFO and waits for the slave to pick them up. If master fails to send data due arbitration lost or any other, will stop transfer with status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.

inbodydescription.para: < Controller uses byte count during bus transaction

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a interrupt mode receive in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It sets the transfer size register so the slave can send data to us. The rest of the work is managed by interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.
is the pointer to the recv buffer.
is the number of bytes to be recv.

inbodydescription.para: < Controller uses byte count during bus transaction

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a polled mode send in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It sends data to the FIFO and waits for the slave to pick them up. If master fails to send data due arbitration lost or any other error, will stop transfer status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.

inbodydescription.para: < Controller uses byte count during bus transaction

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a polled mode receive in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It repeatedly sets the transfer size register so the slave can send data to us. It polls the data register for data to come in. If master fails to read data due arbitration lost or any other error, will return with status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.

inbodydescription.para: < Controller uses byte count during bus transaction

briefdescription.para: The interrupt handler for the master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It does the protocol handling for the interrupt-driven transfers.

If the Master is receiving data then the data is read from the FIFO and the Master has to request for more data (if there is more data to receive). If all the data has been received then a completion event is signalled to the upper layer by calling the callback handler. It is an error if the amount of received data is more than expected.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: This function setup for receive during IBI in interrupt mode.

detaileddescription.para: It enables the required interrupts for performing read operation during IBI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the pointer to the recv buffer.

listitem.para: XST_NO_DATA if message buffer is NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function receives data during IBI in polled mode.

detaileddescription.para: It polls the data register for data to come in during IBI. If master fails to read data due to any error, it will return with status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the pointer to the recv buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a interrupt mode send in slave mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if everything went well.
XST_NO_DATA if MsgPtr is NULL.
Error code if any error.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a interrupt mode receive in slave mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the pointer to the recv buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a polled mode send in slave mode.

detaileddescription.para: It sends data to the FIFO and the master to pick them up.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.

simplesect.para: Caller need to wait for response after calling this function.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a polled mode receive in slave mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.

briefdescription.para: The interrupt handler for the slave mode.

detaileddescription.para: It does the slave side protocol handling for the interrupt-driven transfers.

If the slave is receiving data then the data is read from the FIFO and the slave has to send data on master request data need to write to FIFO. If all the data has been transferred then a completion event is signalled to the upper layer by calling the callback handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

detaileddescription.para: To execute I3C transactions this has to be Enabled. Any data transfer that is in progress is aborted when disabled and no further I3C transactions will happen till I3C enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is flag indicates to enable or disable the I3C.

briefdescription.para: Abort allows controller to kill existing transcation.

detaileddescription.para: In response Abort request, Controller issues a stop condition after existing transcation is finished. Abort bit is auto cleared after Abort is completed.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Resume allows controller to resume the controller from Abort/Error State.

detaileddescription.para: Resume bit will be auto cleared once controller resumes the operation. After Controller goes to Abort/Eroor State. User should handle the necessary action to Abort/Error state (ex: Clearing FIFOs etc)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Update the slave address and BCR register values of available device to the controller RAM.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
device index of XI3c_SlaveInfoTable.

detaileddescription.para: Reset must only be called after the driver has been initialized. The configuration of the device after reset is the same as its configuration after initialization. Any data transfer that is in progress is aborted.
The upper layer software is responsible for re-configuring (if necessary) and reenabling interrupts for the I3C device after the reset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Resets the fifos of I3C device.

detaileddescription.para: Reset must only be called after the driver has been initialized. Any data transfer that is in progress is aborted.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the Odd parity for the dynamic address.

parameterdescription.para: is a dynamic address.

simplesect.para:
- 0 if Addr has odd parity.
1 if Addr has even parity.

detaileddescription.para: It waits for the response from slave and reads the response.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Rx Fifo during IBI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Wait for 2 sec in worst case.
Checks whether the I3C bus is busy.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Gets the dynamic address of the I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

simplesect.para: The address returned includes parity. C-style signature: u8 XI3c_GetDynaAddr(XI3c *InstancePtr)

briefdescription.para: Sets scl high time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is scl high time value to be set.

simplesect.para: Caller need to update other timing parameters if required. C-style signature: void XI3c_SetSclHighTime(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: Gets scl high time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets scl low time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is scl low time value to be set.

simplesect.para: Caller need to update other timing parameters if required. C-style signature: void XI3c_SetSclLowTime(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: Gets scl low time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets sda hold time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is sda hold time value to be set.

simplesect.para: Caller need to update other timing parameters if required. C-style signature: void XI3c_SetSdaHoldTime(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: Gets sda hold time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets bus idle time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is bus idle time value to be set.

simplesect.para: Caller need to update other timing parameters if required. C-style signature: void XI3c_SetBusIdleTime(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: Gets bus idle time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets Tsu Start time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is Tsu Start time value to be set.

simplesect.para: Caller need to update other timing parameters if required. C-style signature: void XI3c_SetTsuStartTime(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: Gets Tsu Start time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets Thd Start time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is Thd Start time value to be set.

simplesect.para: Caller need to update other timing parameters if required. C-style signature: void XI3c_SetThdStartTime(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: This function gets Thd Start time.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets Tsu Stop time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is Tsu Stop time value to be set.

simplesect.para: Caller need to update other timing parameters if required. C-style signature: void XI3c_SetTsuStopTime(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: Gets Tsu Stop time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets Scl open drain high time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is Scl open drain high time value to be set.

simplesect.para: Caller need to update other timing parameters if required. C-style signature: void XI3c_SetSclOdHighTime(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: Gets Scl open drain high time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets Scl open drain low time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is Scl open drain low time value to be set.

simplesect.para: Caller need to update other timing parameters if required. C-style signature: void XI3c_SetSclOdLowTime(XI3c *InstancePtr, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: Gets Scl open drain low time of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Gets Core Revision number of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Gets error status from response of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

simplesect.para: 0 if no error. error code if any error.

briefdescription.para: Check the dynamic address assignment status of I3C in slave mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if address assigned. 0 if address not assigned.

briefdescription.para: Check the response status of I3C.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if response available. 0 if response not available.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
value of Device status.
value of Device status.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XI3c_SetDeviceStatus(XI3c *InstancePtr, u16 Format1, u16 Format2)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
value of Device status.
value of Device status.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XI3c_SetMaxDataSpeed(XI3c *InstancePtr, u16 Format1, u8 Format3)

memberdef.name: XI3c_SetCapsFormat1
memberdef.initializer: XI3c_WriteReg(InstancePtr->Config.BaseAddress, \ XI3C_GETCAPS_REG0, \ (((Caps4 & XI3C_8BITS_MASK) << XI3C_CAPS4_SHIFT) |\ ((Caps3 & XI3C_8BITS_MASK) << XI3C_CAPS3_SHIFT) | \ ((Caps2 & XI3C_8BITS_MASK) << XI3C_CAPS2_SHIFT) | \ (Caps1 & XI3C_8BITS_MASK)))

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
of target device.
of target device.
of target device.
of target device.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XI3c_SetCapsFormat1(XI3c *InstancePtr, u8 Cap1, u8 Cap2, u8 Cap3, u8 Cap4)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
of target device.
of target device.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XI3c_SetCapsFormat2(XI3c *InstancePtr, u8 Cap1, u8 Cap2)

detaileddescription.para: by using protection macros
Handles slave mode transfers.
Handles master mode transfers.
This file contains low level access functions using the base address directly without an instance.
This file contains a configuration table that specifies the configuration of I3C devices in the system.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 gm 02/09/24 First release 1.3 vlt 01/27/26 Fixed codespell issues

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 gm 02/09/24 First release

Ver Who Date Changes -- ----- --------------------------------------------. 1.00 gm 01/25/24 First release 1.1 gm 10/07/24 Added macros for Version Register bit fields. 1.2 gm 02/18/24 Added slave mode support

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 gm 02/09/24 First release 1.3 vlt 01/30/26 Fixed codespell errors.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 gm 03/18/24 Add Scl clock configuration support 1.1 gm 10/07/24 Set Data Hold Time based on IP revision value.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.2 gm 02/18/24 Added slave mode support
